testcase.name: 3180-concept-relationship-node-tag-selectors-testcase
Concept Relationship Node Tag Selectors Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using a concept relationship node with tag selectors for period line-up

variation.name: Concept relationship node with both instant and duration concepts
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. Each column actually contains 3 tagged periods: a single duration and 2 instants corresponding to the start and end of the same period. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. Preferred labels are converted to tag selectors, which are used to select the relevant period from the column.

variation.name: Concept relationship node a period start preferred label on a non-abstract parent concept
variation.description: The concept relationship tree identified by the concept relationship node has a non-abstract parent with a periodStart preferred label. The table.periodStart tag should be added to the roll-up of that node.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with merged rule node parent contributing a tag selector
variation.description: The tag selector should end up on the leaves of the resulting structural node tree
